question: Will Max Verstappen win 4 of the opening 10 races of the 2026 F1 Season?
textDescription:
Austria is the 10th round of the 2026 Season. With the cancellation of Bahrain and Saudi Arabia this market will now resolve at the end of the Belgian Grand Prix 2 races later.

Or if it becomes mathematically impossible for Verstappen to win 4 based on the number of remaining races until Belgium.

Update 2026-03-16 (PST) (AI summary of creator comment): This market will resolve based on the first 10 races that actually take place, not the originally scheduled 10 races. With Bahrain and Saudi Arabia cancelled, the 10th race is now Belgium.
newsShortReason: Verstappen has not won any of the first four races in the 2026 season.
newsKeyEvidence: Verstappen's best finish is 5th place in the first four races. | The 2026 season has 22 races, with 18 remaining after the first four. | Verstappen needs to win four of the remaining 18 races to meet the market criteria.
